arts.sum: Fenerbahce come into Thursday's welcome of Anderlecht on a 12-game unbeaten run following their 2-0 win at Alanyaspor at the weekend. Jose Mourinho has overseen five wins in the last six at home, whil...

arts.ttl: Preview: Fenerbahce vs. Anderlecht - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Fenerbahce and Anderlecht, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
